variables.name: Contraceptives
variables.description: Women must be postmenopausal surgically sterile or willing to use adequate contraception barrier method with spermicidal jelly IUD or oral contraceptives at least 1 effective contraceptive method throughout the study and for 30 days following the study and

variables.name: CorticosteroidDoses
variables.description: Must not be using greater than physiologic doses of a corticosteroid agent dose equivalent to  10 mg/day of prednisone within 28 days of the first day of treatment

variables.name: DMCC_record_id
variables.description: Data Management Coordinating Center Internal Identifier

variables.name: HypersensitivitytoAzacitidine
variables.description: Known or suspected hypersensitivity to Azacitidine or mannitol

variables.name: InformedConsent
variables.description: Must be able to give informed consent

variables.name: LabAbnorm
variables.description: Any of the following laboratory abnormalities

variables.name: LabAbnormList_AbsNeutrophilCt
variables.description: LabAbnormalitiesList: Absolute neutrophil count less than 500 cells/mm3

variables.name: LabAbnormList_SerumCreatinine
variables.description: LabAbnormalitiesList: Serum creatinine more than 2.0 mg/dl

variables.name: LabAbnormList_SerumSGOT_AST
variables.description: LabAbnormalitiesList: Serum SGOT/AST or SGPT/ALT more than 2.0 x upper limit of normal (ULN)

variables.name: LabAbnormList_SerumTotalBili
variables.description: LabAbnormalitiesList: Serum total bilirubin  more than 2 mg/dL

variables.name: MDSClassifications
variables.description: Have Myelodysplastic Syndrome of one of the following classifications

variables.name: MDSFabClassificationsList
variables.description: Have myelodysplastic syndrome using the FAB criteria

variables.name: MDSwIPSSClassification
variables.description: Have myelodysplastic syndrome using the IPSS classification

variables.name: MDSwWHOClassification
variables.description: Have myelodysplastic syndrome using the WHO classification

variables.name: MustNotbeBMTCandidate
variables.description: Must not be candidate for BMT for first line therapy

variables.name: NoMDSIn28Days
variables.description: Must not receive another investigational or approved therapy for MDS within 28 days of study enrollment or growth factors within 14 days of the first day of study drug treatment

variables.name: PreExistingNeurotoxicity
variables.description: Preexisting neurotoxicity neuropathy of Grade 2 or greater according to the NCI Common Toxicity Criteria Version 3 or prior  grade 3 allergic reaction hypersensitivity or rash to thalidomide

variables.name: PriorMalignancy3Yrs
variables.description: Prior malignancy in the 3 years before treatment in this study other than curatively treated carcinoma insitu of the cervix of nonmelanoma skin cancer

variables.name: PriorTherapy
variables.description: Received prior therapy with either Revlimid or Azacitidine

variables.name: RadiationTherapy
variables.description: Radiation therapy chemotherapy or cytoxic therapy given to treat conditions other than MDS and administered within the previous 12 months prior to the first day of treatment or prior stem or bone marrow transplantation at any time

variables.name: ThromboembolicEvent
variables.description: History of thromboembolic event or other condition requiring use of anticoagulation with coumadin warfarin or low molecular weight heparin

variables.name: UnacceptableRisk
variables.description: Any serious medical condition laboratory abnormality or psychiatric illness that in the view of the treating physician would place the subject at an unacceptable risk if he or she were to participate in the study or would prevent that person from giving in
